description: Inside the warehouse, May finds Agent Hart and his team in a hypnotic, trance-like state, demanding she share her pain. She realizes Eva must be controlling them and decides she has to intervene directly. The unsettling atmosphere and May’s determination create a tense confrontation as she faces friends turned hostile.

transcript.line: Agent Hart. Hart, it's Agent May. We need to go now.
What the hell are you doing, sir? We have to go.
Belyakov is controlling you. Hart, that woman is controlling you.
I've got to take her out.
